# Posthive

> Open-source social media scheduling SaaS. Schedule posts to Bluesky, Threads, Instagram, LinkedIn, Mastodon, YouTube, Facebook Pages, Pinterest, and Telegram from a single UI. Self-hostable, AGPL-3.0.

## Product

Posthive lets individuals and teams write once and publish everywhere. Key capabilities:

- Multi-platform posting across 11 networks simultaneously
- First comment scheduling (auto-reply immediately after the post goes live)
- Per-platform content overrides (custom text per account, Pro+)
- Bulk CSV scheduling (hundreds of posts from a spreadsheet)
- Post templates (save and reuse drafts)
- FullCalendar drag-to-reschedule view
- Instagram Reels, Stories, carousels; YouTube Shorts + long-form video
- Pinterest Pins, Telegram channels
- MCP server — AI agents can schedule and manage posts directly
- Public REST API (Pro/Team plans)
- Billing optional — set ENABLE_BILLING=false for self-hosted, all features unlocked

## MCP Integration (AI Agents)

Posthive has a native MCP (Model Context Protocol) server. AI agents can connect and manage posts without opening the app.

**Requires:** Pro or Team plan

### Connect from Claude Code

```bash
claude mcp add posthive --transport http --url https://api.posthive.co/mcp/ph_your_key
```

### Connect from Cursor

Add to `~/.cursor/mcp.json`:

```json
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "posthive": {
      "transport": "http",
      "url": "https://api.posthive.co/mcp/ph_your_key"
    }
  }
}
```

### Connect from Claude.ai

Settings → Connectors → Add custom connector → enter `https://api.posthive.co/mcp` → complete OAuth approval.

### Available MCP Tools

- `list_accounts` — list all connected social accounts
- `create_post` — create a scheduled or draft post (supports media_urls, media_type, youtube_type)
- `get_post` — get a single post by ID
- `list_scheduled_posts` — list posts with optional status filter
- `approve_draft` — promote a draft to scheduled
- `update_post` — update content or reschedule a pending post
- `duplicate_post` — clone a post as a new draft
- `delete_post` — delete a post
- `list_templates` — list saved post templates
- `create_from_template` — create a post from a saved template

All MCP-created posts default to draft. Binary media upload is not possible via MCP — upload via `POST /api/v1/upload` first and pass the returned URL to `create_post`.

## REST API

**Base URL:** `https://api.posthive.co/api/v1`
**Auth:** `Authorization: Bearer ph_your_api_key`
**Plans:** Pro or Team (or all users when billing is disabled)

Endpoints: accounts, posts (CRUD + approve + duplicate), upload, templates.

Full docs: [https://posthive.co/docs](https://posthive.co/docs)

## Platforms Supported

| Platform | Notes |
|---|---|
| Bluesky | App password auth, 300 grapheme limit |
| Threads | OAuth 2.0, 60-day tokens, 500 char limit |
| Instagram | OAuth 2.0, post / reel / story / carousel, image required |
| LinkedIn | OAuth 2.0, 3,000 char limit |
| Mastodon | OAuth 2.0, any instance, 500 char limit |
| YouTube | Google OAuth 2.0, short or long-form video, resumable upload |
| Facebook Pages | OAuth 2.0, text / photo / video / carousel |
| Pinterest | OAuth 2.0, image required, sandbox mode for trial access |
| Telegram | Bot token + channel username, no OAuth |

## Plans

| Plan | Accounts | Posts/month | API + MCP |
|---|---|---|---|
| Creator | 3 | 400 | No |
| Pro | 15 | Unlimited | Yes (3 keys) |
| Team | 50 | Unlimited | Yes (10 keys) |

14-day free trial. Self-hosted deployments can disable billing entirely.
